properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: And can it be that I should gain An interest in the Savior's blood? Died He for me, who caused His pain-- For me, who Him to death pursued?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Amazing love! How can it be, That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me? Amazing love! How can it be, That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He left His Father's throne above So free, so infinite His grace-- Emptied Himself of all but love, And bled for Adam's helpless race:

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Tis mercy all, immense and free, For O my God, it found out me! Amazing love! How can it be, That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?

verse.name: v5
v6
verse.lines: My chains fell off, my heart was free, I rose, went forth, and followed Thee. Amazing love! How can it be, That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?

verse.name: v7
v8
verse.lines: Bold I approach th'eternal throne, And claim the crown, through Christ my own. Amazing love! How can it be, That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me?
